subject: Sacred Charm — a pendant amulet with a blue gem hanging on a beaded chain, depicted as a Trainer Tool card
description: A pendant necklace is centered in the frame against a plain light background. The amulet consists of a string of small beads terminating in a teardrop or oval-shaped gem of vivid blue, encased in a simple gold or neutral-toned setting. The charm has a clean, simple design — talisman-like in character. The overall presentation is understated and object-focused, with soft even lighting making the gem's blue color the most prominent visual element.
foreground: blue gem pendant on a beaded chain
